notes: File provides the infinity-field half of the ComapPointValuationWitness for (1-pi) over K-bar, with two field-general abstractions (inftyOrdTransport_of_ordAtInfty_x_y and comap_pointValuation_eq_infty_of_ordAtInfty_x_y_of_kernelInvariant) that are reused by PencilComapWitnesses.lean for the pencil case. No sorry, no maxHeartbeats overrides; ordAtInftyBaseChange_holds discharges a previously-carried hypothesis making every declaration axiom-clean.
